rows.content: Use this panel to set background and character colors on SPF/PC
menus and panels.  The colors you select are used on all menus
On a monochrome monitor this feature can control the location
of normal and highlighted text. On gray-scale monitors it can
control the level of gray assigned to different types of text.
SPF/PC menus and panels are divided into four color zones, plus
a background color.  A color zone is determined by the context
of the text in the zone, not by its location on the screen.
All text and symbols with the same context are displayed in the
You can assign any color/intensity combination to any zone as
long as all zones differ from the BACKGROUND zone.  Assigning a
text color the same as the BACKGROUND color would make the text
